summary: Comprehensive testing of new GTA RP Business Management features: Tax notices paid/unpaid status toggle, Accounting history snapshots, Weekly transaction filtering, and Permission checkbox fix. ALL features working correctly.

issues: React hydration warning: <span> inside <tbody> - not breaking but appears in console

seed_data_creation: Test employees created during backend tests were cleaned up automatically
context_for_next_testing_agent: All requested features are working: 1) Tax notices have paid/unpaid status that toggles correctly (admin only), 2) Accounting history page shows weekly snapshots visible only to admin, 3) Patrons only see current week transactions (since last Sunday 00:00 UTC), 4) Permission checkboxes in EmployeesPage use div+Check icon instead of Radix Checkbox - no longer causes infinite re-render loop. Background scheduler runs auto snapshots/tax-notices every Sunday 23:59 UTC.

details: POST /api/tax-notices/generate creates notices with status='unpaid'
PUT /api/tax-notices/{id}/status toggles between paid/unpaid
Non-admin users get 403 when trying to toggle status
UI shows green 'PAYÉ' badge for paid, red 'NON PAYÉ' for unpaid
Clicking badge toggles status with toast notification
GET /api/admin/accounting-history returns snapshots (admin only)
POST /api/admin/accounting-snapshot creates manual snapshots
Non-admin users get 403 Forbidden
UI page accessible via sidebar 'Historique comptable' link
Page shows weekly snapshots grouped by date with business filter
GET /api/transactions (as patron) only returns current week
GET /api/businesses (as patron) shows weekly totals only
Admin sees all transactions without week filter
Current week = since last Sunday 00:00 UTC
EmployeesPage loads without blank page bug
Permission toggles use div with onClick instead of Radix Checkbox
Clicking permissions does NOT cause infinite setState loop
Employee creation with toggled permissions works correctly
Employee update with new permissions works correctly
Tax notices: no _id field
Businesses: no _id field
Transactions: no _id field
Users: no _id field
Accounting snapshots: no _id field

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - All features working correctly. Previous permission checkbox bug was caused by Radix Checkbox component's onCheckedChange triggering setState which caused re-renders. Fixed by using div with onClick handler and manual Check icon.
